commit.message:
Add MXFP8 XPU feasibility analysis

Document the investigation into MXFP8 support for Intel XPU via sycl-tla:
- Survey of all Xe dispatch policies in sycl-tla (gap: no grouped+FP8+scaling)
- float_ue8m0_t support (software fallback only on Intel Xe; no CUDA PTX)
- Intel Xe hardware limits (no native blockscaled MXFP8 XMX instruction)
- Three implementation options with effort/quality tradeoffs
- Recommendation: Option A (software dequant pre-pass) now, Option B
  (new sycl-tla MainloopXeL1StagedGroupFP8Scaling) as upstream contribution

commit.message:
fix(pihole): add DNSMASQ_USER=root to prevent FTL capability error

Pi-hole v6 FTL tries to set CAP_SETFCAP before dropping to non-root,
which fails in a Kubernetes security context. Setting DNSMASQ_USER=root
keeps FTL running as root and bypasses the capability elevation.

commit.message:
fix(maglev): correct IC base offset and ToBoolean falsy values

IC base offset: place array IC at bottom of cache area (RSP) instead
of overlapping callee-saved registers. Old formula -(48+mono_bytes)
put IC fields at [RBP-40,-32,-24] which aliases R15/R12/R13 pushes.
New formula -(40+total_cache_bytes) ensures IC is always below all
callee-saved slots.

ToBoolean: check each falsy value explicitly (Smi 0, JIT_FALSE,
JIT_UNDEFINED, JIT_NULL) instead of CMP with 0. The old code treated
all non-zero values as truthy, but JIT_FALSE=0x1_0000_0000 is non-zero.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
